title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 25 - 2017: 20K diameter circles in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder late at night on March 25, 2017, recapping a day spent tracing geographic distances using Google Earth for a project involving circles of increasing diameters (today's background is 20km). He also mentions wanting to engage with Jane Mayer's book 'Dark Money' in relation to wealth inequality, and discloses he got high right before filming, framing marijuana use as personal scientific research in support of legalization.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: uses cannabis intentionally before videos, framing it as scientific research to support legalization policy
implicitly pro-legalization; mocks Hillary Clinton's 'do more science first' deferral as a reason to keep doing personal research
interested in the topic and wants to connect Dark Money themes to his own ideas about wealth discrepancy

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got up at 11 AM on March 26th.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle procrastinated and started his day by doing circles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle focused on tracing distances for his Google Earth project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle aims to finish the Google Earth dimensions page by tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to trace the remaining distances to complete his project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After tracing distances, Kyle will focus on the website part of the project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is meticulously tracing distances, such as a marathon in Tokyo or trails on islands.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle creates the best courses by starting from the middle or across.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's background distance was 10 km yesterday and 20 km today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to increase his background distance to 40 km, then 80 km, and so on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle estimates it will take another week and a half to complete his tracing project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle hasn't created his background yet but plans to do so after the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wants to create a page inspired by the book 'Dark Money' by Jane Mayer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle wants to tie 'Dark Money' into his work by addressing wealth discrepancy and inequality.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle got high before the video to enhance his scientific research.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle sees his videos as scientific research to inform policymakers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle recalls Hillary Clinton's stance on needing more scientific research before legalizing marijuana.
